name: messages
context: Send conversational messages to Claude and receive structured responses via the Messages API
info: The Messages API is the core endpoint for interacting with Claude. You send an array of conversational turns (user and assistant messages) and receive the next assistant response. Each message can contain text, images, documents, tool use blocks, and tool results. The API supports system prompts, temperature control, stop sequences, structured output via JSON schema, and extended thinking. The response includes content blocks (text, tool_use, thinking), a stop_reason indicating why generation ended, and token usage metrics. This is the foundation that all other Anthropic capabilities build on — [[anthropic/tool-use]], [[anthropic/prompt-caching]], [[anthropic/messages/stream]], and [[anthropic/batch]] are all extensions of the Messages API.
triggers: create a message with the anthropic api
make an api call to claude
body:
# Messages API

The Messages API (`POST /v1/messages`) is the single endpoint for all Claude interactions. You provide a model, a max token budget, and an array of message turns. Claude returns the next assistant message.

## Request Structure

```json
{
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "max_tokens": 1024,
  "system": "You are a helpful coding assistant.",
  "messages": [
    {"role": "user", "content": "Explain async/await in Python"}
  ]
}
```

## Required Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `model` | string | Model ID: `claude-opus-4-6`, `claude-sonnet-4-6`, `claude-haiku-4-5` |
| `max_tokens` | integer | Maximum tokens to generate (model-specific caps) |
| `messages` | array | Array of `{role, content}` message turns |

## Optional Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `system` | string/array | — | System prompt with instructions and context |
| `temperature` | float | 1.0 | Randomness 0.0-1.0. Lower for analytical, higher for creative |
| `top_p` | float | — | Nucleus sampling threshold |
| `top_k` | integer | — | Sample from top K tokens |
| `stop_sequences` | array | — | Custom strings that halt generation |
| `stream` | boolean | false | Enable SSE streaming. See [[anthropic/messages/stream]] |
| `tools` | array | — | Tool definitions. See [[anthropic/tool-use]] |
| `tool_choice` | object | — | How to use tools: `auto`, `any`, `tool`, `none` |
| `metadata` | object | — | `user_id` for abuse detection |
| `thinking` | object | — | Extended thinking config (`type`, `budget_tokens`) |
| `output_config` | object | — | Structured output via JSON schema |

## Response Format

```json
{
  "id": "msg_01XFDUDYJgAACzvnptvVoYEL",
  "type": "message",
  "role": "assistant",
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "content": [
    {"type": "text", "text": "Here's how async/await works..."}
  ],
  "stop_reason": "end_turn",
  "stop_sequence": null,
  "usage": {
    "input_tokens": 25,
    "output_tokens": 150,
    "cache_creation_input_tokens": 0,
    "cache_read_input_tokens": 0
  }
}
```

## Content Block Types

**Input content blocks** (in messages):
- `text` — `{"type": "text", "text": "..."}`
- `image` — `{"type": "image", "source": {"type": "base64", "media_type": "image/png", "data": "..."}}`
- `document` — `{"type": "document", "source": {"type": "base64", "media_type": "application/pdf", "data": "..."}}`
- `tool_result` — `{"type": "tool_result", "tool_use_id": "...", "content": "..."}`

**Output content blocks** (in response):
- `text` — Generated text
- `tool_use` — `{"type": "tool_use", "id": "toolu_...", "name": "...", "input": {...}}`
- `thinking` — Extended reasoning (when enabled)

## Stop Reasons

| Reason | Meaning |
|--------|----------|
| `end_turn` | Claude finished its response naturally |
| `max_tokens` | Hit the max_tokens limit |
| `stop_sequence` | Matched a custom stop sequence |
| `tool_use` | Claude wants to call a tool |

## Multi-Turn Conversations

```python
import anthropic

client = anthropic.Anthropic()

messages = []
messages.append({"role": "user", "content": "What is the capital of France?"})

response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=messages
)

# Add assistant response to conversation
messages.append({"role": "assistant", "content": response.content[0].text})
messages.append({"role": "user", "content": "What about Germany?"})

# Continue the conversation
response2 = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=messages
)
print(response2.content[0].text)
```

## System Prompts

```python
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    system="You are a senior Python developer. Respond with concise code examples.",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Write a retry decorator"}]
)
```

## Extended Thinking

```python
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-opus-4-6",
    max_tokens=16000,
    thinking={"type": "enabled", "budget_tokens": 10000},
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Solve this step by step: ..."}]
)
```

## Structured Output

```python
response = client.messages.create(
    model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
    max_tokens=1024,
    output_config={
        "type": "json_schema",
        "schema": {
            "type": "object",
            "properties": {
                "name": {"type": "string"},
                "age": {"type": "integer"}
            },
            "required": ["name", "age"]
        }
    },
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Extract: John is 30 years old"}]
)
```

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Purpose |
|----------|----------|
| `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` | API key (required) |
| `ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL` | Override base URL (optional) |

sections.title: Request parameters
sections.body: Required: `model` (string), `max_tokens` (integer), `messages` (array of {role, content}). Optional: `system`, `temperature` (0-1), `top_p`, `top_k`, `stop_sequences`, `stream`, `tools`, `tool_choice`, `metadata`, `thinking`, `output_config`. Messages alternate between user and assistant roles. Content can be a string or array of content blocks.

sections.title: Response format
sections.body: Response includes `id` (message ID), `type` (always 'message'), `role` (always 'assistant'), `model`, `content` (array of text/tool_use/thinking blocks), `stop_reason` (end_turn, max_tokens, stop_sequence, tool_use), and `usage` (input_tokens, output_tokens, cache_creation_input_tokens, cache_read_input_tokens).

sections.title: Content block types
sections.body: Input blocks: text, image (base64 or URL), document (PDF), tool_result. Output blocks: text, tool_use (with id, name, input), thinking (extended reasoning). Each block has a `type` field. Tool use blocks include a unique `id` that must be referenced in the corresponding tool_result.

sections.title: Multi-turn conversations
sections.body: Build conversations by appending each response to the messages array. Messages must alternate between user and assistant roles. Consecutive same-role messages are merged. The full conversation history is sent with each request — there is no server-side session state. Use [[anthropic/prompt-caching]] to avoid reprocessing long conversation histories.

links.context: Define tools for Claude to call

related.note: A valid API key is required for all message requests
Tool use extends messages with function calling capabilities
Streaming is the same endpoint with stream: true

scripts.name: Send Message
scripts.description: Send a message to Claude and print the response
scripts.inline:
import anthropic
import json
import os
import sys

client = anthropic.Anthropic()

user_message = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else "Hello, Claude"
model = os.environ.get("ANTHROPIC_MODEL", "claude-sonnet-4-6")

response = client.messages.create(
    model=model,
    max_tokens=1024,
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": user_message}]
)

print(response.content[0].text)
print(f"\n---\nTokens: {response.usage.input_tokens} in / {response.usage.output_tokens} out")

content.description: Text string or array of content blocks

depends.reason: API key required for all message requests

author: dojo-community
